message:
feat(conformance): Add wish SSH framework conformance tests

Add comprehensive conformance tests for the wish crate:
- Server options and builder tests (address, banner, version, timeouts)
- Address parsing tests (localhost, IPv4, IPv6, various ports)
- Middleware creation tests (activeterm, logging, recover, elapsed, etc.)
- Error type tests (auth, io, ssh, session, configuration)
- Session and Context tests (user, commands, env vars, PTY)
- PublicKey tests (creation, equality, fingerprints)
- BubbleTea integration tests
- Fixture-based conformance tests

51 tests pass successfully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
